title: Migrate act-step artifacts (claims.json, reassess-decision.json, logs/) to runs/{runId}/
description:
ISS-231 introduced runs/{runId}/ for data-refresh subtasks, but act-step artifacts still write to legacy paths:

1.  — troubleshooter.log, email-drafter.log, challenger.log (FIXED in agent .md files — now reads runId from state.json)
2.  — event-wrapper.sh reads from here for delta (FIXED — now checks runs/{runId}/ first)
3.  — written by troubleshooter, read by challenger/reassess/act/summarize
4.  — written by reassess, read by act

Items 3-4 are cross-step shared artifacts. Options:
A) Move to runs/{runId}/output/ and update all readers (10+ files)
B) Keep in .casework/ root (shared), archive to runs/{runId}/ on patrol cleanup
C) Symlink from runs/{runId}/ → .casework/ root

Recommend option B: least invasive, preserves run-level auditability.
